name_en: Basilica of Saint Michael the Archangel

phrases.french: Est-ce que la basilique est ouverte aujourd'hui ?
phrases.phonetic: es-kuh lah bah-ZEEK eh oo-VAIR-tuh oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.context: Hours vary by season. The baroque façade visible from the sea is one of Menton's most iconic views.

phrases.french: Le parvis est magnifique — c'est la meilleure vue sur la mer ?
phrases.english: The square is magnificent — is this the best view of the sea?
phrases.phonetic: luh par-VEE eh mah-nyee-FEEK — say lah may-YUR vew syr lah MAIR
phrases.context: The mosaic forecourt (parvis) in front of the basilica is a famous viewpoint over the rooftops and sea.

phrases.french: À quelle heure est la messe ?
phrases.phonetic: ah kel UR eh lah MES
phrases.context: The basilica holds regular services. Visitors are welcome outside of service times.

tips: The yellow and orange baroque façade is best photographed from the harbour or beach below
The mosaic forecourt is free to visit anytime and offers one of Menton's best sea views
Dress modestly — shoulders and knees covered — to enter the basilica
